'''鈭歱-dh-v''' ('''padhava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monomorphize|monomorphize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monomorphize|monomorphize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-dh-v
|-
! Lemma
| padhava
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhavithi|padhavithi]] || [[word:padhaviji|padhaviji]] || [[word:padhavishi|padhavishi]] || [[word:padhavi|padhavi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhavuthuth|padhavuthuth]] || [[word:padhavujuj|padhavujuj]] || [[word:padhavushush|padhavushush]] || [[word:padhav|padhav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhavuthu|padhavuthu]] || [[word:padhavuju|padhavuju]] || [[word:padhavushu|padhavushu]] || [[word:padhavu|padhavu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhavufuth|padhavufuth]] || [[word:padhavufuj|padhavufuj]] || [[word:padhavufush|padhavufush]] || [[word:padhavuf|padhavuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhavethe|padhavethe]] || [[word:padhaveje|padhaveje]] || [[word:padhaveshe|padhaveshe]] || [[word:padhave|padhave]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhavothoth|padhavothoth]] || [[word:padhavojoj|padhavojoj]] || [[word:padhavoshosh|padhavoshosh]] || [[word:padhav|padhav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhavotho|padhavotho]] || [[word:padhavojo|padhavojo]] || [[word:padhavosho|padhavosho]] || [[word:padhavo|padhavo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhavofoth|padhavofoth]] || [[word:padhavofoj|padhavofoj]] || [[word:padhavofosh|padhavofosh]] || [[word:padhavof|padhavof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:padhav忙th忙|padhav忙th忙]] || [[word:padhav忙j忙|padhav忙j忙]] || [[word:padhav忙sh忙|padhav忙sh忙]] || [[word:padhav忙|padhav忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhavathath|padhavathath]] || [[word:padhavajaj|padhavajaj]] || [[word:padhavashash|padhavashash]] || [[word:padhav|padhav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhavatha|padhavatha]] || [[word:padhavaja|padhavaja]] || [[word:padhavasha|padhavasha]] || [[word:padhava|padhava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhavafath|padhavafath]] || [[word:padhavafaj|padhavafaj]] || [[word:padhavafash|padhavafash]] || [[word:padhavaf|padhavaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:padhavasha|padhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopadhavasha|gopadhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipadhavasha|gokipadhavasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:padhavn眉sha|padhavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopadhavnkn眉sha|gopadhavnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhavn眉sha|gokipadhavn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:padhavsh毛sha|padhavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopadhavnksh毛sha|gopadhavnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipadhavsh毛sha|gokipadhavsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhavrosha|padhavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhavnkrosha|gopadhavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhavrosha|gokipadhavrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:padhavmusha|padhavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhavnkmusha|gopadhavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhavmusha|gokipadhavmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:padhavsherasha|padhavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopadhavnksherasha|gopadhavnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipadhavsherasha|gokipadhavsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:padhavngasha|padhavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopadhavnkngasha|gopadhavnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipadhavngasha|gokipadhavngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:padhavyasha|padhavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopadhavnkyasha|gopadhavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipadhavyasha|gokipadhavyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:padhavyamasha|padhavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopadhavnkyamasha|gopadhavnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipadhavyamasha|gokipadhavyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhavn眉sh毛sha|padhavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhavnkn眉sh毛sha|gopadhavnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhavn眉sh毛sha|gokipadhavn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhavn眉rosha|padhavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhavnkn眉rosha|gopadhavnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhavn眉rosha|gokipadhavn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhavn眉musha|padhavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhavnkn眉musha|gopadhavnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhavn眉musha|gokipadhavn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhavsh毛n眉sha|padhavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhavnksh毛n眉sha|gopadhavnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhavsh毛n眉sha|gokipadhavsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhavsh毛rosha|padhavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhavnksh毛rosha|gopadhavnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhavsh毛rosha|gokipadhavsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhavsh毛musha|padhavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhavnksh毛musha|gopadhavnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhavsh毛musha|gokipadhavsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhavron眉sha|padhavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhavnkron眉sha|gopadhavnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhavron眉sha|gokipadhavron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhavrosh毛sha|padhavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhavnkrosh毛sha|gopadhavnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhavrosh毛sha|gokipadhavrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:padhavromusha|padhavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopadhavnkromusha|gopadhavnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipadhavromusha|gokipadhavromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:padhavmun眉sha|padhavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopadhavnkmun眉sha|gopadhavnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipadhavmun眉sha|gokipadhavmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:padhavmush毛sha|padhavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopadhavnkmush毛sha|gopadhavnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipadhavmush毛sha|gokipadhavmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:padhavmurosha|padhavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopadhavnkmurosha|gopadhavnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipadhavmurosha|gokipadhavmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:padhav|padhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙dh忙v|p忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopadhav|hopadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙dh忙v|hop忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopadhav|hohopadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙dh忙v|hohop忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉padhav|n眉padhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙dh忙v|n眉p忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉padhav|n眉n眉padhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙dh忙v|n眉n眉p忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂padhav|n茂padhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙dh忙v|n茂p忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂padhav|n茂n茂padhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙dh忙v|n茂n茂p忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupadhav|lupadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙dh忙v|lup忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupadhav|lulupadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙dh忙v|lulup忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipadhav|lipadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙dh忙v|lip忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipadhav|lilipadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙dh忙v|lilip忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopadhav|kopadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙dh忙v|kop忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopadhav|kokopadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙dh忙v|kokop忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepadhav|kepadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙dh忙v|kep忙dh忙v]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepadhav|kekepadhav]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙dh忙v|kekep忙dh忙v]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
